title: Average 'Benchmark' line
excerpt: I have a dashboard that draws from 2 boards (all about social engagement). I want to add a ‘benchmark’ line that uses the average of one column. I currently have to do this manually. Can it be amended so when you add a b…

posts.author: DaveTilmouth (Dave Tilmouth)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a dashboard that draws from 2 boards (all about social engagement). I want to add a ‘benchmark’ line that uses the average of one column. I currently have to do this manually. Can it be amended so when you add a benchmark you can choose the column and also whether you want average, mean, median etc? Multiple benchmark lines would also be super-useful!
